text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
"Ore," "watashi"... Multiple words for "I"...
"After-school ramen" is a phrase of invitation.
Intel complete.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
The problem is question tags—"right?" "Isn't it?"
"Y'know?" ...These remain difficult to utilize.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Complete fluency in Japanese... That's my highest
priority. Continuing mission...
